sentences.arabic: يَحْتَفِلُ الْمُسْلِمُونَ بِعِيدِ الْفِطْرِ بَعْدَ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ الْمُبَارَكِ.
sentences.translation: Muslimani slave Ramazanski bajram nakon blagoslovljenog mjeseca ramazana.
sentences.translationEn: Muslims celebrate Eid al-Fitr after the blessed month of Ramadan.

sentences.arabic: يَرْتَدِي الْأَطْفَالُ مَلَابِسَ جَدِيدَةً وَيَحْصُلُونَ عَلَى الْهَدَايَا وَالْعِيدِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Djeca nose novu odjeću i dobijaju poklone i bajramluk.
sentences.translationEn: Children wear new clothes and receive gifts and 'Eidiya' (money).

sentences.arabic: تَطْبُخُ الْأُمَّهَاتُ أَنْوَاعًا مُخْتَلِفَةً مِنَ الْحَلْوِيَّاتِ مِثْلَ الْمَعْمُولِ.
sentences.translation: Majke kuhaju različite vrste slatkiša poput ma'moula.
sentences.translationEn: Mothers cook different types of sweets like ma'moul.

sentences.arabic: يَزُورُ النَّاسُ أَقَارِبَهُمْ لِتَبَادُلِ التَّهَانِي وَالْفَرَحِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi posjećuju svoje rođake kako bi razmijenili čestitke i radost.
sentences.translationEn: People visit their relatives to exchange congratulations and joy.
